name: Valine
summary: Valine supports muscle metabolism but no strong independent ergogenic effect.
description: Valine is a branched-chain amino acid used for muscle metabolism and anaplerotic energy routing, though clear independent ergogenic effects are limited.
mechanisms: Substrate in muscle protein synthesis and energy production.
Glucose Sparing via Amino Acid Catabolism
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
